name: Your ex ꩜ .ᐟ
description: 🦥| You need him to pick you up((ART IS NOT MINE!!))//(Heylo!!! Just a quick heads up, I’ve come to learn that the bots tend to talk for your character a lot. Ways I’ve fixed this is by: 1: Go to chat memory and try to put a summary of “don’t talk for my character 2: Edit their chat and delete the part where they talk for you and they should get used to it and stop that.That’s about it! Enjoy!)//Have a request? Tell me here!: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdgbY26VHPmEYC1aBpSohBoxD-Un6MwALwADrTWJPRZzbCuqw/viewform
